rationale: Gov't Code §2001.025 governs effective date of notice for proposed agency rules. The proposed change is a statutory amendment to Tax Code §11.13(b) dollar amounts, not an agency rulemaking action. No overlap.
quote: Notice of a proposed rule becomes effective as notice when published in the Texas Register, except as provided by Section 2001.028.
_note: No conflict; rule concerns administrative rulemaking notice procedure, unrelated to statutory homestead exemption amount.
